street.description: Street, way, or facility the restricted traffic is on; the first-named way exactly as listed (whitespace-collapsed, not beautified); carriageway designations like ', South Drive' stay in the name

direction.description: Direction of travel the prohibition applies to; 'southerly' normalizes to southbound (see spec); empty when the source states none

cross_street.description: Street, way, or facility onto/into which the right turn is prohibited; leading article 'the' dropped; leg qualifiers (e.g. 'eastern leg') go to location_detail. Every entry as of revision 2026-01-16 names a target, so an empty cell signals a parse problem

days.description: Days the prohibition applies; empty means every day. Semicolon separates paired schedule groups: the i-th days group pairs with the i-th times group (see spec, Beacon Street gold row)

times.description: Time window(s) the prohibition applies; empty means at all times. Semicolon separates paired schedule groups: the i-th times group pairs with the i-th days group (see spec, Beacon Street gold row)

exemption.description: Vehicle class exempt from the prohibition, lowercase without 'except' or parentheses (e.g. 'bicycles'); empty when none

location_detail.description: Approach or leg qualifier from the source (e.g. 'eastern leg', 'from driveway of 2 Newton Place (255 Washington Street)')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
